default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Attention and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy and content marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current SEO performance plateauing at \~7,500 weekly clicks; focus on changing trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Backlink profile needs improvement; various tactics discussed (outreach, broken link building, thought leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Internal keyword strategy refinement needed for main site pages to help Google understand context](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic content ideas beyond blog posts (e.g., industry-specific pages, sales scripts)](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Technical improvements identified: adding article schema and author information to blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Performance

  - [Weekly clicks hovering around 7,500, not breaking out of this range](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Impressions on upward trajectory, likely not hit by recent algorithm updates](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Focus on changing trajectory to accelerate traffic and attract right type of visitors](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Current backlink profile underperforming; competitors have more backlinks to their articles](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Tactics discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [Leverage GrowthX's client network for initial backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [Outreach to VC-backed companies and incubators for link exchanges](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [Target marketing niche (non-competitive) companies](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
      - [Broken link building: offer replacement content for broken links on target blogs](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [Data-driven journalism pieces using unique company data](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Thought leadership content for social media traction](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)

### Outbound Email Optimization

  - [Current stats: \~60% open rate, 30 emails per mailbox, 180-210 emails per domain daily](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Recommendations:](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [Reduce to 90-100 emails per domain (max 3 per domain)](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Split across multiple workspaces to avoid restrictions](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [Continue inbox placement tasks for better deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)

### Internal Keyword Strategy

  - [Main site pages lack clear keyword focus, making it difficult for Google to understand context](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Key areas for improvement:](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [Optimize page titles with target keywords (e.g., "AI sales agent" instead of generic descriptions)](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
      - [Refine content on product pages to include relevant keywords](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [Align internal pages with blog content for cohesive topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

### Programmatic Content Ideas

  - [Competitor comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Feature-specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Industry and use case pages (e.g., "How to improve sales calls by industry")](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Integration opportunity pages (with consideration for competition)](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Buying guides, "best of" lists](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Sales script templates by industry](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Focus on content that aligns with decision-maker personas (VPs of Sales, RevOps) rather than individual contributors](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Add article schema to blog posts for better context and potential ranking boost](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Include author information on the page (currently only in image) with proper schema markup](https://fathom.video/share/wRTvPwMuZWHbHb6s_pFP2QaC45KPdLhs?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
